_note: vol-01 p54~p97 영어화 (Opus). 패널순서·유닛수 = 소스 정확매칭.

sentences.text: Those children's shoulders… are growing taller than mountains.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 저 아이들의 어깨가… 산보다 커지고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: Lightning pours from their single eyes, and storms from their hundred hands.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 외눈에서 번개가, 백 개의 손에서 폭풍이 나오는구나.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: When they grow up, they might take my sky from me.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 자라면 내 하늘을 빼앗을지도 몰라.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: Pen, Uranus's eyes… have turned cold.
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 우라노스 눈빛이… 차가워졌어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Fear has taken root deep in his heart.
sentences.ko: 펜: 두려움이 마음 깊은 곳에 자리 잡았구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Uranus's magic sent his strongest children down into the deep.
sentences.ko: 우라노스의 마법이 가장 힘센 아이들을 깊은 곳으로 보냈다.

sentences.text: You… shall sleep in the depths.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 너희는… 깊은 곳에서 잠들거라.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: In a place no light can reach, without even a dream.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 빛이 닿지 않는 자리에서, 꿈도 없이.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: My love, no! Those children are ours!
sentences.ko: 가이아: 여보, 안 돼요! 그 아이들은 우리 아이예요!
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Gaia, this is to protect the sky.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 가이아, 이건 하늘을 지키는 일이오.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: Pen… my fingertips have gone cold.
sentences.ko: 이리: 펜… 손끝이 차가워졌어.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The six giants fell asleep deep within Gaia. The light was shut away.
sentences.ko: 여섯 거인은 가이아의 깊은 곳에서 잠들었다. 빛이 닫혔다.

sentences.text: …Mother…
sentences.ko: 브론테스: …어머니…
sentences.speaker: Brontes

sentences.text: Brother, my hands are growing heavy…
sentences.ko: 스테로페스: 형, 손이 무거워져요…
sentences.speaker: Steropes

sentences.text: I'm so sorry, my children.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 미안하구나, 내 아이들.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Your mother will surely come for you. I promise.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 어머니가 꼭 데리러 갈게. 약속해.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: The light… is fading away.
sentences.ko: 하라: 빛이… 사라지고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: They're only sleeping, Hara. Just sleeping.
sentences.ko: 펜: 잠든 거란다, 하라. 잠든 것뿐이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Don't be afraid, Cronus.
sentences.ko: 레아: 무서워하지 마, 크로노스.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Sister, did our brothers fall asleep too?
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 누나, 형들도 같이 잠든 거예요?
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Will Father… send us to that place as well?
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 아버지가… 우리도 그곳에 보내실까요?
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Quiet. Father mustn't hear us.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 조용히 해. 아버지가 들으시면 안 돼.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: What will we do when our turn comes…
sentences.ko: 테이아: 우리 차례가 오면 어떡하지…
sentences.speaker: Theia

sentences.text: Pen, the youngest is trembling the most, yet his eyes are firm.
sentences.ko: 이리: 펜, 막내가 제일 떨고 있는데 눈빛은 단단해.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: For the first time, Gaia's tears fell as rain.
sentences.ko: 가이아의 눈물이 처음으로 비가 되어 내렸다.

sentences.text: My children have fallen asleep deep within my heart.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내 가슴 깊은 곳에서 아이들이 잠들었구나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mountains, seas, and fields — please, weep with me.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 산도, 바다도, 들판도 함께 울어 다오.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Pen, it's raining… is this the first rain?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 비가 내려… 이게 첫 비야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes, Hara. A mother's sorrow is falling as rain.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그래, 하라. 어머니의 슬픔이 비가 되어 내리는 거란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: …Mother… where…
sentences.ko: 브론테스: …어머니… 어디…
sentences.speaker: Brontes

sentences.text: I can hear my children crying…
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내 아이들의 울음이… 들려.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: From deep, deep below, they're calling out in their sleep.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 깊고 깊은 곳에서, 잠든 채로 부르고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: A mother's love reaches all the way to the deepest place.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어머니의 사랑은 가장 깊은 곳까지 닿는단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Gaia, you look like you're in so much pain…
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아, 너무 아파 보여요…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Gaia…
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: We're here. We'll stay by your side.
sentences.ko: 하라: 우리 여기 있어요. 곁에 있을게요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Gaia, is there any way we can help?
sentences.ko: 이리: 가이아, 우리가 도울 수 있을까요?
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Even something very small is fine.
sentences.ko: 이리: 아주 작은 일이라도 좋아요.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: When sorrow is at its greatest, even small hands become a great strength.
sentences.ko: 펜: 슬픔이 가장 클 때, 작은 손도 큰 힘이 된단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Gaia, will you just leave things as they are?
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아, 이대로 두실 거예요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: While your children are asleep down in the depths…
sentences.ko: 하라: 아이들이 깊은 곳에서 잠들어 있는데…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: No, Hara.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 아니다, 하라.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: A mother's sorrow soon becomes resolve.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 어머니의 슬픔은 곧 결심이 된단다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Soon the wind will change. Soon the light will return.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 곧 바람이 바뀔 거야. 곧 빛이 돌아올 거야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Pen, the look in Gaia's eyes has changed.
sentences.ko: 이리: 펜, 가이아 눈빛이 달라졌어.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: What Gaia drew up from the depths was a golden sickle.
sentences.ko: 가이아가 깊은 곳에서 꺼낸 것은, 황금 낫이었다.

sentences.text: This sickle is a hard light that grew deep within the earth.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 이 낫은 대지 깊은 곳에서 자라난 단단한 빛이란다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: So that's… the golden sickle. A tool that opens the way to freedom.
sentences.ko: 펜: 저게… 황금 낫이구나. 자유를 여는 도구야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: A hard mineral took in Gaia's sorrow and became light.
sentences.ko: 펜: 단단한 광물이 가이아의 슬픔을 받아 빛이 되었구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: It's really shining. Who could possibly lift it?
sentences.ko: 이리: 정말 빛나요. 누가 저걸 들 수 있을까요?
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: It looks heavy… and warm.
sentences.ko: 하라: 무겁고… 따뜻해 보여.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: My children, who will help your mother?
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내 아이들아, 누가 어머니를 도와주겠니?
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, I have to guard the sea.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 어머니, 저는 바다를 지켜야 해요.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: I have to keep the path of light.
sentences.ko: 히페리온: 저는 빛의 길을 지켜야 합니다.
sentences.speaker: Hyperion

sentences.text: Mother, I… I'm not sure I can.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 어머니, 저는… 자신이 없어요.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Father's eyes frighten me.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 아버지의 눈빛이 무서워요.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: I'm sorry, Mother…
sentences.ko: 크리오스: 죄송해요, 어머니…
sentences.speaker: Crius

sentences.text: Cronus…
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스…
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I'm sorry to ask this of you, the youngest of all.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 가장 어린 너에게 묻기는 미안하구나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother…
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니…
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: You said my brothers are crying down in the depths.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 형들이 깊은 곳에서 울고 있다고 하셨죠.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I'll try.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 제가 해 볼게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: The youngest… his hands are trembling, but his eyes aren't.
sentences.ko: 이리: 막내가… 손이 떨리는데도 눈은 안 떨려.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Mother, I'll go for the sake of my brothers.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 형제들을 위해 제가 가겠습니다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I'll wake my brothers in the depths.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 깊은 곳의 형들을 깨우겠습니다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Thank you, Cronus.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 고맙다, 크로노스.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I'm laying a great promise upon your small shoulders.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 너의 작은 어깨에 큰 약속을 얹는구나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: This is the moment a young branch becomes the firmest root.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어린 가지가 가장 단단한 뿌리가 되는 순간이구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The youngest took up the tool of freedom.
sentences.ko: 막내가 자유의 도구를 받아 들었다.

sentences.text: This sickle will be heavy — on your heart and on your hands.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 이 낫은 무거울 거야. 마음도, 손도.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: But it can wake your brothers from their sleep.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 하지만 형제들의 잠을 깨울 수 있단다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, I give you my promise.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 약속드릴게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: That night, the first hero of the myth stood holding the golden sickle.
sentences.ko: 그날 밤, 신화의 첫 영웅이 황금 낫을 들고 섰다.

sentences.text: Mother, I'll set my brothers free.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 형제들을 자유롭게 할게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I'll open the light in the depths once more.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 깊은 곳의 빛을 다시 열겠습니다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Pen… the youngest's back is starting to look bigger.
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜… 막내의 등이 점점 커 보여.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Resolve is what makes the shoulders grow, Hara.
sentences.ko: 펜: 결심이 어깨를 키우는 거란다, 하라.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: My children, let me tell you why I called you.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 아이들아, 너희를 부른 까닭을 말하마.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Your brothers… are still trapped down in the depths.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 너희 형제들이… 아직도 깊은 곳에 갇혀 있다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, what are you planning?
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 어머니, 무슨 일을 꾸미시는 거예요?
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: One is enough. With the courage of one, everyone is set free.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 한 사람이면 된다. 한 사람의 용기면, 모두가 풀려난다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: This is hard gold I grew deep within myself.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 이건 내 깊은 곳에서 키운 단단한 금이다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: It's not a weapon to swing, but a mark to engrave a promise upon.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 휘두르는 무기가 아니라, 약속을 새기는 표식이지.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, that light is…
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 어머니, 그 빛은…
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: It's a metal I've never seen before.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 처음 보는 금속이에요.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Mother, I… I can't do it.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 어머니, 저는… 못 합니다.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: Father's sky is too vast and too heavy.
sentences.ko: 크리오스: 아버지의 하늘이 너무 크고 너무 무거워요.
sentences.speaker: Crius

sentences.text: One wrong step, and all of us might vanish.
sentences.ko: 휘페리온: 한 발만 잘못 디뎌도 우리 모두가 사라질지도 몰라요.
sentences.speaker: Hyperion

sentences.text: I'll guard the waterways. But that one task… please, anything but that.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 저는 물길을 지킬게요. 하지만 그 일만은… 부디.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: Mother, please find us another way.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 어머니, 다른 길을 찾아 주세요.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: It was the youngest who reached out his hand first.
sentences.ko: 가장 어린 자가 가장 먼저 손을 내밀었다.

sentences.text: Mother, I'll lift it.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 제가 들겠어요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Cronus, you're the youngest!
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 크로노스, 너 막내잖아!
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: Because I'm the youngest, I haven't learned much fear yet.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 막내라서, 아직 두려움을 덜 배웠어요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: …Are you certain, my youngest?
sentences.ko: 가이아: …정말이냐, 내 막내야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Pen, is it really all right for this to happen…
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 정말 이래도 되는 걸까요…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: It feels like young Cronus is taking on far too heavy a burden.
sentences.ko: 하라: 어린 크로노스가 너무 큰 짐을 지는 것 같아요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Well, in the myth this path is already set.
sentences.ko: 이리: 음, 신화에서는 이미 정해진 길이야.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Our part is to watch over it to the very end, from beside them.
sentences.ko: 이리: 우리는 옆에서 끝까지 봐 주는 거지.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: …To the very end?
sentences.ko: 하라: …끝까지요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Hara, a record is memory, and memory is freedom.
sentences.ko: 펜: 하라, 기록은 곧 기억이고, 기억은 곧 자유란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: If we forget this story, Gaia's tears and Cronus's courage will vanish too.
sentences.ko: 펜: 우리가 이 이야기를 잊으면 가이아의 눈물도, 크로노스의 용기도 사라지지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Not forgetting — that is the one thing we can do.
sentences.ko: 펜: 잊지 않는 것, 그것이 우리가 할 수 있는 일이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: …I understand, Pen. I'll watch over it to the end.
sentences.ko: 하라: …알겠어요, 펜. 끝까지 지켜볼게요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Cronus, this sickle is not a tool to swing.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스, 이 낫은 휘두르는 도구가 아니다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: It's a key of freedom that goes to your trapped brothers.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 갇힌 형제들에게 가는 자유의 열쇠란다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother… it's heavy.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니… 무겁네요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: That weight is the weight of a promise. Can you bear it?
sentences.ko: 가이아: 무게는 약속의 무게란다. 견딜 수 있겠느냐.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: …I'll try to bear it.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …견뎌 볼게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Promise me, my youngest.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 약속해 다오, 막내야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: That once you've freed your brothers, you yourself will never trap them away again.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 형제들을 풀어 준 뒤에는, 너 또한 그들을 다시 가두지 않겠다고.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: …I won't trap them away again.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …다시 가두지 않을게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Once more, clearly.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 한 번 더, 또렷이.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I'll keep my brothers free, Mother.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 형제들을 자유롭게 두겠어요, 어머니.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Within that light, the first promise was engraved between mother and youngest son.
sentences.ko: 그 빛 속에서, 어머니와 막내 사이에 첫 약속이 새겨졌다.

sentences.text: Even those left behind by their fear watched the youngest one's back.
sentences.ko: 두려움 뒤에 남은 자들도, 막내의 등을 보았다.

sentences.text: The youngest… took up the burden in our place.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 막내가… 우리를 대신해 짊어졌어.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: We should be ashamed of ourselves.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 부끄럽구나, 우리는.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: Cronus, we'll stand with you on the road you walk.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 크로노스, 네가 가는 길에 우리도 함께 서마.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Even if we can't take the light, we'll take in the shadows.
sentences.ko: 휘페리온: 빛은 못 들어도, 그림자는 받아 주마.
sentences.speaker: Hyperion

sentences.text: Go safely, my youngest.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 잘 가거라, 내 막내야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Until you return, I will wait for you here in this cave.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 네가 돌아올 때까지, 나는 이 동굴에서 너를 기다린다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, I'll be sure to come back.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 꼭 돌아올게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Don't forget your promise.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 약속, 잊지 말거라.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I won't forget.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 잊지 않아요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Another page has returned!
sentences.ko: 펜: 또 한 페이지가 돌아왔구나!
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: When a promise is engraved, a forgotten star returns to its place.
sentences.ko: 펜: 약속이 새겨지면, 잊혀진 별이 제자리로 돌아온단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Wow, one more star must have risen over Gimje's night sky too!
sentences.ko: 이리: 와아, 김제 밤하늘에도 별 하나 더 떴겠는걸요!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: …I'm so relieved.
sentences.ko: 하라: …다행이에요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The mother's tears flowed with both sorrow and relief.
sentences.ko: 어머니의 눈물은 슬픔과 안도가 함께 흘렀다.

sentences.text: My youngest, I wonder if I've laid too heavy a burden on you.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 막내야, 너에게 너무 무거운 짐을 지운 건 아닐까.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Please, don't forget your promise.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 부디 약속을 잊지 말아 다오.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Cronus, let me ask you one thing.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 크로노스, 한 가지 묻자.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: When our trapped brothers are freed… they'll be stronger than us.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 갇힌 형제들이 풀려나면… 그들은 우리보다 강할 거야.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Mother's promise — will you really keep it to the very end?
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 어머니의 약속, 정말 끝까지 지킬 거니?
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: …Brothers, please don't say that right now.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …형들, 지금은 그 말 하지 말아 줘요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Today, I only want to think about the promise.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 오늘은 약속만 생각할래요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: One promise is engraved, and an age slowly awakens. But upon young shoulders, the weight of that promise was laid as well.
sentences.ko: 한 약속이 새겨지고, 한 시대가 천천히 깨어난다. 그러나 어린 어깨 위에는, 약속의 무게도 함께 얹혔다.

sentences.text: Mother, I'll keep my promise.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 약속은 지킬게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: …I'll be able to, won't I?
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …지킬 수 있겠죠?
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Cronus…
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스…
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: The story of the first age has finally all returned to its place.
sentences.ko: 펜: 첫 시대의 이야기가, 마침내 모두 제자리로 돌아왔어.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Really? From Chaos all the way to the golden sickle, without missing a single line?
sentences.ko: 하라: 정말? 카오스부터 황금 낫까지, 한 줄도 빠지지 않고?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Not a single letter is missing. The stars are singing inside the book.
sentences.ko: 펜: 한 글자도 빠뜨리지 않았단다. 별이 책 속에서 노래하는구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Wow, there's a whole universe inside the book!
sentences.ko: 이리: 와, 책 안에 우주가 통째로 들어가 있어!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: It really is. Every time I turn a page, a star twinkles.
sentences.ko: 하라: 정말이네. 페이지를 넘길 때마다 별이 반짝거려.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: All right, the road is open! It's time to head back to Gimje.
sentences.ko: 이리: 자, 길이 열렸어! 김제로 돌아갈 시간이야.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The rainbow has appeared again. The light is so warm.
sentences.ko: 하라: 무지개가 다시 나타났어. 빛이 너무 따뜻해.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The book is calling us. Quick, let's get up on the road.
sentences.ko: 펜: 책이 우리를 부르고 있어. 어서 길 위로 올라타자.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The first story of the gods ends not with a farewell, but with a promise.
sentences.ko: 신화 속 신들의 첫 이야기는, 작별이 아니라 약속으로 끝난다.

sentences.text: Farewell, my children. Let us meet again next time.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 잘 가렴, 아이들아. 다음에 또 만나자꾸나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Lady Gaia, I'll come again. I promise!
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아 님, 또 올게요. 꼭이요!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Goodbye to the sleeping giants too! When you wake, let us tell your story.
sentences.ko: 이리: 잠든 거인들에게도 안녕! 깨어나면 우리 얘기 들려줘요.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Gaia's love is as deep as the universe. Even a farewell is one page of love.
sentences.ko: 펜: 가이아의 사랑은 우주만큼 깊어. 작별도 사랑의 한 페이지란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: What kind of gods will be waiting for us next time?
sentences.ko: 하라: 다음엔 어떤 신들이 우리를 기다리고 있을까?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Soon the age of the twelve Titans and Zeus will begin.
sentences.ko: 펜: 곧 열두 티탄과 제우스의 시대가 열린단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Which means the gods are about to get a whole lot louder!
sentences.ko: 이리: 그 말은, 신들이 훨씬 더 시끄러워진다는 뜻이지!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Loud is fine by me. This adventure was truly wonderful too.
sentences.ko: 하라: 시끄러워도 좋아. 이번 모험도 정말 멋졌으니까.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The golden sickle is waiting on the next page. Steel your heart.
sentences.ko: 펜: 다음 페이지엔 황금 낫이 기다리고 있어. 마음을 단단히 먹으렴.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: We're back. It's really the same cave we left from.
sentences.ko: 하라: 돌아왔어. 정말 우리가 떠났던 그 동굴이야.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The rainbow road plays with time in a fun way. For you it's a single moment, but for us it's an eternity.
sentences.ko: 이리: 무지개 길은 시간을 재미있게 다루지. 너희에겐 한순간이지만, 우리에겐 영원이란다.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Time was folded up inside the book. One page is as long as an entire age.
sentences.ko: 펜: 시간이 책 속에서 접혀 있었던 거야. 한 페이지가 한 시대만큼 길단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: So Gimje is exactly as it was at dawn on the day we left?
sentences.ko: 하라: 그럼 김제는 우리가 떠난 그날 새벽 그대로네?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That's right. The stars waited for us.
sentences.ko: 이리: 그렇지. 별이 우리를 기다려 줬어.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The stars in Gimje's night sky had all returned to their places.
sentences.ko: 김제 밤하늘의 별이, 모두 제자리로 돌아왔다.

sentences.text: The Baekje constellation ceiling painting, too, returned to its place along with the stars.
sentences.ko: 백제 별자리 천장화도, 별과 함께 제자리로 돌아왔다.

sentences.text: Goodness, all the constellations have come back at once. Even the conservation team can't explain why.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 세상에, 별자리가 한꺼번에 다 돌아왔어요. 보존팀도 이유를 모르겠다고 합니다.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: In the very spots that were empty just last night, the Baekje stars are set in place once more.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 어젯밤만 해도 비어 있던 자리에, 백제의 별이 그대로 박혀 있네요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: It's truly remarkable. Who could have brought these stars back?
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 정말 신기한 일입니다. 누가 이 별들을 다시 데려온 걸까요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Both the Korean constellations and the Greek ones were made by people who looked up at the same sky.
sentences.ko: 한국의 별자리도, 그리스의 별자리도, 같은 하늘을 본 사람들이 만들었다.

sentences.text: Hara, were the constellations in Greek myth real, way back in the old days too?
sentences.ko: 친구: 하라야, 그리스 신화에 나오는 별자리도 옛날부터 진짜로 있었던 거야?
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Yeah. It started with Chaos, and there were Gaia and Uranus and so many gods.
sentences.ko: 하라: 응. 카오스에서 시작해서, 가이아랑 우라노스랑, 정말 많은 신들이 있었어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: How do you know all that so well? Did you read it in a book?
sentences.ko: 친구: 너 어떻게 그렇게 잘 알아? 책에서 본 거야?
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Hmm, that's a secret. Maybe someday you'll find out too.
sentences.ko: 하라: 음, 그건 비밀이야. 언젠가 너희도 알게 될지도 몰라.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Now that you say it's a secret, I'm even more curious!
sentences.ko: 친구: 비밀이라니까 더 궁금하잖아!
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Hwanin gave rise to Hwanung, and Hwanung to Dangun. That's the first story of our Korean peninsula.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 환인이 환웅을 낳았고, 환웅이 단군을 낳았지야. 우리 한반도의 첫 이야기란다.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: In Greece, Chaos gave rise to Gaia, Gaia to Uranus, and Uranus to the twelve Titans.
sentences.ko: 하라: 그리스에선 카오스가 가이아를 낳고, 가이아가 우라노스를 낳고, 우라노스가 열두 티탄을 낳았지.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The beginnings are different, but the flow is so similar.
sentences.ko: 하라: 시작은 달라도, 흐름이 참 비슷해.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Hara, dear, what are you thinking about so deeply?
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 우리 하라, 뭔 생각을 그리 깊게 하니야?
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: Grandpa, I think people long ago looked at the same sky and made similar stories.
sentences.ko: 하라: 할아버지, 옛날 사람들은 같은 하늘을 보고 비슷한 이야기를 만든 것 같아요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Ha ha, when did my granddaughter grow up to have such big thoughts?
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 허허, 우리 손녀가 어느새 이렇게 큰 생각을 다 하는구나.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: And so, the age of Cronus begins.
sentences.ko: 그리고, 크로노스의 시대가 시작된다.

sentences.text: Hara, the next page is calling you.
sentences.ko: 펜: 하라, 다음 페이지가 너를 부르고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Already? I've only just gotten all the stars back.
sentences.ko: 하라: 벌써? 별을 겨우 다 돌려놓은 참인데.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The golden sickle has awakened. The age of Cronus is about to open its doors.
sentences.ko: 펜: 황금 낫이 깨어났어. 크로노스의 시대가 곧 문을 연단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Okay. See you again soon, Pen.
sentences.ko: 하라: 그래. 곧 또 보자, 펜.
sentences.speaker: Hara
